---
title: "The GameTheory Package"
short-title: "GameTheory"
author: "Raban Heller"
date-modified: today
abstract: "Shapley value, Banzhaf index, nucleolus, and bankruptcy problems with the GameTheory package."
keywords: ["GameTheory", "Shapley value", "Banzhaf", "nucleolus", "R package"]
---

# The GameTheory Package {#sec-gametheory-package}

::: {.callout-note}
This chapter is under development.
:::
